message:
🐛 fix: GPU fallback respects authoritative empty + footer cursor scoping (#8601) (#8602)

The GPU "stable" fallback now only uses cached data while isRefreshing or
isLoading is true (transient empty). When a settled fetch returns empty,
lastGpuDataRef is cleared so the UI correctly shows no GPUs — fixing the
case where GPUs removed from a cluster would never clear.

Added explicit cursor-pointer to the console <a> link in ClusterGrid
footer so the parent cursor-default container does not suppress the
interactive affordance.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
